stories.title: Fix AllDebrid API calls to match v4/v4.1 spec exactly
acceptanceCriteria: uploadMagnet uses POST with magnets[] param and receives { id, ready } — verified by test script
getTorrentStatus uses POST /v4.1/magnet/status with id param — verified by test script
getTorrentFiles uses POST /v4/magnet/files with id[] param as array — verified by test script
unlockFile uses POST /v4/link/unlock with link param — verified by test script
All requests use Authorization: Bearer header (not ?apikey= query param)
Test script with a demo magnet URI successfully uploads → checks status → gets files
TypeScript compiles with zero errors (npx tsc --noEmit exits 0)

stories.title: Fix PlayerPage streaming chain to pass AllDebrid URLs correctly
acceptanceCriteria: PlayerPage playFile checks file.link exists before calling unlockLink
unlockLink IPC passes the AllDebrid file URL (not a numeric ID)
unlockFile returns the final streaming download link from /v4/link/unlock
startPlayback receives the final mpv streamable URL
Electron preload types match the new function signatures (string link, not number id)

stories.title: Add debug logging and error handling for API failures
acceptanceCriteria: getTorrentFiles logs full debug response to /tmp/nyaa-debug.json on status AND files calls
getTorrentStatus logs the raw response when it fails
Error messages show the actual AD error code and message
PlayerPage displays specific error (not generic 'No video files found') for AD errors
